description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a uniform, solid color throughout. The sofa consists of three main seating sections and an extended chaise lounge on the right, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The backrest and seat cushions are rectangular, thick, and appear to be firmly padded, offering both comfort and support. The armrests are present only on the left and at the end of the chaise, both straight and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The legs are slim, straight, and metallic, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and untextured, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with firm, rectangular cushions, straight armrests, and slim metallic legs, all in a solid, smooth upholstery. The design is minimalist and well-suited for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped layout, with three main seat sections and a chaise lounge extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest on the left and the uniform height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the seat cushions along the length of the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chaise lounge extension and the straight armrest at the end of the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three back cushions, all rectangular and uniform in size, with a sectional layout; cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests present on the left end and at the end of the chaise, at the same height as the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight metallic legs positioned at the corners and one central support under the chaise, all exposed and slightly elevating the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, segmented visually by the individual back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, textures, or decorative stitching.
